# AgenticOrg — AI Virtual Employees for Enterprise

> AgenticOrg lets you create AI virtual employees or deploy 25 pre-built agents across Finance, HR, Marketing, and Operations — with human-in-the-loop governance on every critical decision.

## What is AgenticOrg?

AgenticOrg is an enterprise AI virtual employee platform. Create custom AI agents with names, personas, and tailored instructions through a no-code wizard — or deploy 25 pre-built agents that automate back-office operations across 5 departments: Finance, HR, Marketing, Operations, and Back Office. Each agent connects to 42 enterprise systems (SAP, Oracle Fusion, Salesforce, GSTN, Darwinbox, Tally, Stripe, HubSpot, Slack, and more) and executes domain-specific tasks with human approval on every critical decision.

## Key Features

- **AI Virtual Employees**: Create custom AI agents with employee names, designations, and specializations. Multiple agents can share the same role with smart routing (e.g., 3 AP Processors for different regions)
- **No-Code Agent Creator**: 5-step wizard to build agents — set persona, pick role, configure prompt from 26 templates, define behavior, and deploy
- **Prompt Template Library**: 26 production-tested prompt templates with variable substitution. Admins can create custom templates. Full prompt audit trail with edit history
- **25 Pre-Built AI Agents**: AP Processor, AR Collections, Reconciliation, Tax Compliance, Month-End Close, FP&A, Onboarding, Payroll Engine, Talent Acquisition, Performance Coach, Offboarding, L&D Coordinator, Campaign Pilot, Content Factory, SEO Strategist, CRM Intelligence, Brand Monitor, Support Triage, IT Operations, Compliance Guard, Contract Intelligence, Vendor Manager, Facilities Agent, Legal Ops, Risk Sentinel
- **42 Enterprise Connectors (269 tools)**: Oracle Fusion, SAP S/4HANA, Salesforce, GSTN Portal, Income Tax India, EPFO, Darwinbox, Tally Prime, Zoho Books, QuickBooks, Stripe, Banking AA, Pinelabs Plural, Slack, GitHub (9 tools, verified), Jira (11 tools, verified), Confluence, HubSpot (13 tools, verified), Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Meta Ads, PagerDuty, ServiceNow, Zendesk, and more
- **Agents That Act**: Agents don't just generate text — they call real external APIs. The Ops Commander creates Jira tickets. CRM Intelligence reads HubSpot contacts and deals. DevOps Scout queries GitHub repos. All via a tool_calls pipeline: LLM reasons → outputs tool calls → Tool Gateway executes → results fed back to LLM for synthesis
- **Human-in-the-Loop (HITL)**: Every critical decision requires human approval. Prompts are locked after agent promotion — clone to edit
- **Shadow Mode**: Test agents against real data before promoting to production
- **Smart Routing**: When multiple agents share a type, tasks are routed by specialization and routing filters
- **Role-Based Access Control**: 6 roles (CEO, CFO, CHRO, CMO, COO, Auditor) with domain isolation
- **Agent Observatory**: Real-time monitoring of agent reasoning traces, tool calls, confidence scores
- **Evaluation Matrix**: 66 golden test cases across 6 dimensions (quality, safety, performance, reliability, security, cost)
- **Complete Audit Trail**: Every agent decision and prompt edit logged with 7-year retention
- **Per-Agent LLM Selection**: Each agent can use Gemini 2.5 Flash (default), Claude 3.5 Sonnet, or GPT-4o. Safe fallback if API key missing
- **Org Chart Hierarchy**: Agents report to other agents (parent_agent_id). Hierarchical escalation on failure or HITL
- **Per-Agent Budget Enforcement**: Monthly cost caps with auto-block. Budget endpoint shows real-time spend. Agents without budget run unlimited
- **1,031+ Automated Tests**: Unit (739), security (84), connector harness (174), synthetic data (15), functional (13). Plus 125/125 production E2E passing at 100%

## India-First Connectors

AgenticOrg is built for Indian enterprise with native connectors for:
- GSTN (Goods and Services Tax Network) — GSTR-1, 3B, 9 filing
- Income Tax India — 26Q, 24Q, Form 16A
- EPFO (Employees Provident Fund Organisation)
- Darwinbox HRMS
- Tally Prime
- Banking Account Aggregator (AA)

## Use Cases by Role

### CFO (Finance)
- Invoice processing with OCR, GSTIN validation, 3-way matching
- Daily bank reconciliation (99.7% auto-match rate)
- GST/TDS computation and filing preparation
- Month-end close automation
- Cash flow forecasting and board pack generation

### CHRO (HR)
- New hire onboarding (offer letter → IT provisioning → training)
- Payroll processing with PF, ESI, TDS computation
- Resume screening and interview scheduling
- Performance management and OKR tracking
- Exit processing and final settlement

### CMO (Marketing)
- Multi-channel campaign orchestration
- Content generation with brand guidelines
- SEO audits and keyword research
- Lead scoring and CRM segmentation
- Brand sentiment monitoring

### COO (Operations)
- Support ticket classification and routing
- Infrastructure monitoring and incident response
- Compliance audit and policy enforcement
- Contract review and renewal management
- Vendor risk scoring and spend analysis

## Pricing

- Free: 35 agents, 20 connectors, 500 tasks/day
- Pro ($499/month): 12 agents, 20 connectors, unlimited tasks
- Enterprise (custom): All 25 agents, 42 connectors (269 tools), dedicated support
